summary.title: Checkout service latency and error increase
summary.probableCause: Database connection pool saturation affecting checkout-service request handling.

attributes.action: checkout-service has high latency and elevated errors
attributes.claim: checkout-service has high latency and elevated errors

attributes.claim: Service logs show database connection wait and timeout messages

payload.claim: Customer Interview Notes
Prototype Usage Log Summary
Founder Strategy Note
A local-first research assistant is the lower-friction first product direction for this team.
Cloud collaboration should be deferred until repeated local use is proven.
The current evidence is not enough to decide enterprise readiness.

summary.question: Should a small team start with a local-first AI research assistant before building a cloud collaboration product?
summary.recommendation: Start with a local-first research assistant. Delay cloud collaboration until the local workflow proves repeated use and quality.

attributes.action: Customer Interview Notes
attributes.claim: Customer Interview Notes
attributes.value: Early users prefer tools that run on their own machine when testing with notes, drafts, or customer documents.

risks: users may still expect sync later

attributes.action: Prototype Usage Log Summary
attributes.claim: Prototype Usage Log Summary
attributes.value: Users completed local import and summarization more often than team-sharing setup. Most drop-offs happened when configuration required accounts or remote services.

attributes.action: Founder Strategy Note
attributes.claim: Founder Strategy Note
attributes.value: The initial product should prove quality and repeat use before introducing mobile, team, or marketplace complexity.

risks: slower collaboration features may reduce team adoption

attributes.action: A local-first research assistant is the lower-friction first product direction for this team.
attributes.claim: A local-first research assistant is the lower-friction first product direction for this team.
attributes.value: Interview notes show privacy and local-first preferences. Prototype logs show higher completion for local import and summarization. Strategy note emphasizes quality before expansion.

attributes.action: Cloud collaboration should be deferred until repeated local use is proven.
attributes.claim: Cloud collaboration should be deferred until repeated local use is proven.
attributes.value: Drop-offs increased when remote setup or account configuration was required. Founder strategy note warns against overbuilding team and marketplace complexity.

attributes.action: The current evidence is not enough to decide enterprise readiness.
attributes.claim: The current evidence is not enough to decide enterprise readiness.
attributes.value: The usage sample is small and may not represent enterprise buyers.
